# Meet The Mind Technologies

> Founder-led Salesforce consultancy specializing in Salesforce implementation,
> systems integration, and automation for B2B revenue teams. Best known for
> connecting billing, finance, and subscription platforms (Chargent, Recurly,
> QuickBooks) directly into Salesforce via Apex, plus Agentforce AI agents and
> Apollo.io lead automation. Senior-only delivery by founder Mitesh Jain
> (10+ years, 5x Salesforce Certified, Agentblazer Innovator 2025). Serves the
> United States, United Kingdom, United Arab Emirates, and Australia.

## What we do
- Salesforce implementation — Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Education Cloud
- Systems & billing integration into Salesforce — Chargent, Recurly, QuickBooks Online, custom Apex / REST integrations
- Agentforce AI agents — lead qualification, 24/7 service, internal operations
- Apollo.io to Salesforce lead automation — bi-directional sync, scoring, routing
- Salesforce RevOps, Data Cloud, health checks, customization, and data migration

## Proven case studies (named clients)
- Adam Mesh Trading Group (Financial Services): native Chargent subscription billing on Sales Cloud with automated dunning and failed-payment recovery.
- Stock News Network LLC (Financial Services): Recurly <-> Salesforce subscription integration via custom Apex, with real-time payment/renewal sync.
- Lakewood University (Education): two-way QuickBooks Online <-> Salesforce Education Cloud integration syncing tuition, refunds, and balances.

## Differentiators
- Founder-led, senior-only delivery — no junior handoffs, no account-manager middlemen.
- Native Salesforce builds and integrations (Apex, Flows) — measurable outcomes, no black-box delivery.
- 10+ years Salesforce experience; 5x Salesforce Certified; Agentblazer Innovator 2025.
- 98% client satisfaction; 100+ clients worldwide.
